title: The Riku Family's Tragedy
description: Pages 16–16 focus on the riku family's tragedy, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as the truth behind the Toy Soldier and his devotion to Rebecca begins to surface as Dressrosa's tragedy grows clearer.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What DAH!!? I couldn't see Nuttin'....!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: All of the big names remaining in D-block!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: And in the end, none remain standing!! Is something like this even allowed to happen!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: In this assault on D- block...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It was all over in an instant!!!

summary: The Riku Family's Tragedy focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as the truth behind the Toy Soldier and his devotion to Rebecca begins to surface as Dressrosa's tragedy grows clearer.
